title: MCLN EX97 Additional Config SplitMove_Retain_ItemBarcode_Config_Guide_v1.1
fullText:
center 83548 center 290830 Split Move iLPN - Scanned Barcode Updates Configuration Guide 0 0 Split Move iLPN - Scanned Barcode Updates Configuration Guide Table of Contents TOC \o "1-3" \h \z \u 1. Add LPN_DETAIL.REF_FIELD_7 to iLPN Split Rule Columns PAGEREF _Toc192063754 \h 3 2. Create Split iLPN Inbound Rule PAGEREF _Toc192063755 \h 6 3. Enable Invoke Rule parameter on Split Move iLPN Transaction PAGEREF _Toc192063756 \h 8 4. Post Configuration Instructions   PAGEREF _Toc192063757 \h 9 5. Questions and Answers  PAGEREF _Toc192063758 \h 10 Add LPN_DETAIL.REF_FIELD_7 to iLPN Split Rule Columns Navigate to the Rule Column Assignments UI and select the Rule Columns button Select the Add button once in the Rule Columns UI   Configure the Rule column for LPN_DETAIL.REF_FIELD_7 as displayed below: Hit Save after Use the blue arrow in the top left-hand corner to return to the Rule Column Assignments UI Select 'iLPN Split' from the Rule type drop down menu and 'Selection' in the Selection/Sequencing Flag filters   Scroll down in the Available column names to find LPN detail REF FIELD 7 . Select the record and hit the Add button: Once your new rule column is populated on the Selected columns window, hit the Save button   Create Split iLPN Inbound Rule Navigate to the Inbound Rules UI and press the Add button on the bottom right Enter the Event description and type displayed below and click the Save button   To add a new Rule to the event, click the Add buttons under Rule List and Definition , respectively:   Input the following fields in the Definition (Comparison Value = ^LPN_DETAIL.REF_FIELD_7 ):   Click on the Parameters tab , fill out the Rule Name & Priority , and select your REF_FIELD_7 Rule column and the Add> button   Once LPN_DETAIL.REF_FIELD_7 is populated in the Selected window, hit the Save button Enable Invoke Rule parameter on Split Move iLPN Transaction Navigate to the Transaction Parameters UI and search for Split* in the Transaction Name search filter Select the Split Move iLPN record and click the Parameters tab Click the Edit button , turn on parameter 11-11 ‘Invoke Rules’ , and click Save : Confirm the rest of the Split Move iLPN transaction parameters match the above screenshot Post Configuration Instructions        Once the configuration has been entered, the following actions need to be taken before the configuration is active:      System Action    Required?    No Action Needed   No   Environment Cache Clear   Yes   Environment Restart   No   App Server Restart   No      To clear the cache – go to the Cache Administration UI, and click the Clear All button.   Questions and Answers       This below table is used to track questions that were asked and answered regarding this enhancement. If the question resulted in any action it is listed against the question.   #    Asked By    Question    Answered By    Answer    Date Added    Action Taken
